title: Emma in Parliament - Emma Lewell MP
headings: h2: My Early Day Motion calling for compensation for those affected by building society scandal
text_excerpt: Emma in Parliament - Emma Lewell MP 0191 427 1240 emma.lewell.mp@parliament.uk Home About Emma Emma in South Shields Emma in Parliament Pride In Place Gallery Contact Select Page Holocaust Memorial Day 2026 Jan 27, 2026 | Emma in Parliament , Latest News Today I signed the Holocaust Educational Trust (UK) Book of Commitment. Remembering the six million Jewish men, women and children murdered in the Holocaust. As the voices of survivors become fewer, we have a duty to ensure their stories are never forgotten. read more My Early Day Motion calling for compensation for those affected by building society scandal May 7, 2024 | Emma in Parliament , Latest News I have been contacted by several constituents recently making my office aware of the financial and emotional trauma caused by local building societies after they mis-sold estate-planning and will-writing services to a number of... read more Site map: About Emma Contact Emma in Parliament Emma in South Shields Gallery Home Key Causes Latest News & Recent Press Pride In Place Privacy Policy Latest news: Pride In Place Drop In Events Pride In Place Neighbourhood Board Chair: Role Description Holocaust Memorial Day 2026 It is the honour of my life to be re-elected as your MP for South Shields Search my site: Search for: Find out if Emma is your MP Enter your UK postcode here: Newsletter sign up: First Name: Last Name: Email address: Leave this field empty if you're human: Facebook X Instagram
